message:
docs(robot): clarify summary computation comment in PrintBeadsList

The comment previously said "ALL beads" which was misleading since
it meant "all beads returned by the query" not "all beads in the
project". Clarified to "full result set" which accurately describes
that the limit only affects returned items, not the summary counts.
